R.J. Eytle-Rock

Position: Guard

6-3, 225lb (190cm, 102kg)

Hometown: London, United Kingdom

High School: Barking Abbey HS

Schools: Maryland-Baltimore County (Men) and Utah State (Men)

  • 2020-21 All-AmEast
  • 2018-19 AmEast All-Freshman
+2
